text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: La-laaah, la-la-laaah! ♪ Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I decide to go out shopping. Upon stepping outside, I
run into Smart Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are you going out too? I'm on my way to get some creative input! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: For how to become the most cute 'n' sparkly Umadol ever, of course!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The other day, this one super popular idol said, "I made it to where I
am today thanks to all the input I got!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I figured I need more input too! So much that I can't fit any more
into my head! And just enough that I don't go crazy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...This sounds slightly concerning.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I mean, sure—if you're willing! I'll take all the advice I can
get! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: First, we go to a movie theater to watch a musical.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sniff... That last scene was wonderful... I didn't think the bartender would be a descendant of the Mozart...
choice_data_list: The songs and choreography were amazing too.
The songs and choreography were amazing too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You can really tell how much everyone loves their craft! It's a bit
different from Umadol stuff, but I think performances like these are
special in their own way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Next, we head to an amusement park famous for its parades.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Look at that mascot character over there! It's so round, but its
movements are so sharp!
choice_data_list: Whoever they are, they're a total pro.
Whoever they are, they're a total pro.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! You'd definitely have to practice every day to move like that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm gonna practice back handsprings 'til I can do ten in a row in
any outfit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hit the streets and soon stumble upon a freestyle rap battle going
on outside.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, a rap battle! This is the first time I've seen something like this
in real life! Th-they're really into it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is a clash of two strong personalities, right? Identity is an
important part of being an Umadol, but I don't know if I'm on their
level yet...
choice_data_list: No need to compare yourself to a rapper.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I think it'd be better to have some kind of persona! Wouldn't that be more fun to watch?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need to develop one interesting enough to beat those rappers!
Maybe something edgy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel like we're veering off track here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we return to the station, the sound of a powerful drum fills the air.
I look around, but there's not a drum to be found—only a lone,
empty-handed performer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! Air drums!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's so cool! The performer's air drumsticks perfectly match the
music coming from the speakers!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's like there are real drums there! How do you move your body so
freely like that?! All I can do is sing and dance...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... If I practice enough, maybe I can do that too! Air drums... Air
guitar... Doesn't matter which!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...She's gotten completely sidetracked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Night falls, and we arrive at a nearly empty park. The only sound
around us is the rustling of leaves in the wind. Well, that, and...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! What's that?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That noise... It sounds like a flute those wandering monks use!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that one's just out here alone, playing by themselves!
Now that's confidence! Talk about believing in yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Do you think... I could do the same?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, not yet! I'm not even close to their level! I still have a ways to go
before I can be a monk, don't I?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks my way, her gaze determined yet strangely hollow.
On her face is the expression of a lost soul.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wha?!
choice_data_list: What is it that you want to be?
What is it that you want to be?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What I want to be? Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. That's what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm not trying to become a monk, a rapper, or an air
drummer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm trying to be... an Umadol.
choice_data_list: Input is only meant to be food for thought.
Input is only meant to be food for thought.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for reminding me... I almost lost sight of what really
matters.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm glad you came along. I would've been running around in
circles on my own.
choice_data_list: What inspired you the most today?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The movie had amazing acting, but the parade showed off some
incredible stunts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The rap battle was intense in a good way, and the air drums were
crazy impressive. As for the monk, well... I'm still shocked we just
randomly ran into one.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But they all shared one thing in common—they believed in themselves
and stuck to their own paths! So... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's it! What I liked the most was the way they all shined!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Every performer and their audiences had a sparkle in their eyes! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I don't know if the monk had a sparkle. I didn't get to
see their face... But anyway!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone gave everything for their performances, and it inspired all
the people watching!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that amazing? It makes me want to light up the world for other
people too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the next day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Have you heard of fire dancing before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I admire the desire to learn, but she is way too easily influenced. I'll
have to keep an eye on her moving forward.
